mapper.sql: ss.id, ss.user_id, ss.assigned_admin_id, ss.status, ss.last_message, ss.last_message_at, ss.created_at, ss.updated_at, u.username, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.is_read_by_user = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unread_by_user, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.is_read_by_admin = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unread_by_admin
mapper.select: SELECT FROM support_sessions ss JOIN users u ON ss.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN support_messages sm ON ss.id = sm.session_id WHERE ss.id = #{id} GROUP BY ss.id, ss.user_id, ss.assigned_admin_id, ss.status, ss.last_message, ss.last_message_at, ss.created_at, ss.updated_at, u.username

SELECT FROM support_sessions ss JOIN users u ON ss.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN support_messages sm ON ss.id = sm.session_id WHERE ss.user_id = #{userId} AND ss.status = 'OPEN' GROUP BY ss.id, ss.user_id, ss.assigned_admin_id, ss.status, ss.last_message, ss.last_message_at, ss.created_at, ss.updated_at, u.username ORDER BY ss.updated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM support_sessions ss JOIN users u ON ss.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN support_messages sm ON ss.id = sm.session_id WHERE ss.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY ss.id, ss.user_id, ss.assigned_admin_id, ss.status, ss.last_message, ss.last_message_at, ss.created_at, ss.updated_at, u.username ORDER BY ss.updated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM support_sessions ss JOIN users u ON ss.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN support_messages sm ON ss.id = sm.session_id WHERE ss.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY ss.id, ss.user_id, ss.assigned_admin_id, ss.status, ss.last_message, ss.last_message_at, ss.created_at, ss.updated_at, u.username ORDER BY ss.updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO support_sessions (user_id, assigned_admin_id, status, last_message, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{assignedAdminId}, #{status}, #{lastMessage}, #{lastMessageAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE support_sessions SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, last_message_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE support_sessions SET assigned_admin_id = #{adminId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE support_sessions SET status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
